topic: A person wearing a 'Hennin' headdress walking through a 15th-century court.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Side view, tracking a solitary figure in a hennin through a stone court corridor; background arches and tapestries kept non-distracting.
Scene 2 — Movement (2-5s): Slight tilt up to reveal the hennin's height; profile shot as the subject walks, archway blurred in the background; steady, measured pace.
Scene 3 — Close (5-8s): Low-angle close on the hennin brim and gown folds as the figure passes a gilded doorway, silhouette framed by stone and banners in the court.
parsed_generation.narration: This sequence centers a single figure in a hennin moving through a 15th-century court. The height and silhouette of the hennin signal status and formality, while the camera stays tight on the subject. Textures of stone, tapestry, and light convey era and atmosphere without dialogue. The result is a restrained, cinematic glimpse of presence within historical space.
